info.name: ThriveFund API
info.description:
ThriveFund backend — full API collection with tests.

Recommended demo flow:
1. Auth → Login
2. Organizations → Create Organization
3. Goals → Create Goal
4. Virtual Accounts → Create Virtual Account (saves account_number)
5. Webhooks → Mock Simulate Payment
6. Reconciliation → Overview
7. Reports → Financial Summary

exec: pm.test('400 for wrong current password', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
